assets.note: Steel/white-gold GMT with a meteorite dial — bluespeak 'BLRO' bezel.

assets.note: Nationwide asking median for the 2010–2012 997.2 Turbo S.

assets.name: Porsche 992.1 GT3 Touring
assets.note: Wingless 992-gen GT3 with the Touring package (2022–2023).

assets.name: Aston Martin V12 Vantage S 7-Speed Manual Coupe
assets.note: 5.9L NA V12 with the dogleg 7-speed manual — coupe only, MY2017 (a handful of '18s). ~100 US manual coupes.

assets.name: Aston Martin V12 Vantage 6-Speed Coupe
assets.note: First-gen 5.9L V12 in the compact Vantage, 6-speed manual only (US MY2011–2012). Rarely on dealer lots — value leans on BaT sales.

personal.name: My 2012 Porsche 997.2 Turbo S
personal.note: Mirrors the live 997.2 Turbo S market median (BaT + AutoTrader + AutoTempest).
